The '''Trebodar system''' had only one habitable [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Danton VI]]. It also contained the ice planet [[Teshi]], which had one [[Moon/Legends|moon]], the gas giant [[Narn IV]], with no moons, a barren rock called [[Pelicd]] with one moon, and a second gas giant [[Chanj]], which had 3 moons.
